title: Manufacturing Engineer - Bajaj Auto - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Bajaj Auto - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Bajaj Auto in Ahmedabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Auto:
Bajaj Auto is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Auto!
